reset files & cache.command: git checkout -- test/AquaLifecycle.t.sol test/AquaStorageTest.t.sol src/Aqua.sol && forge clean

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/AquaLifecycle.t.sol && forge build

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/AquaStorageTest.t.sol && forge build

edit & compile Solidity contract: src/Aq.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> src/Aqua.sol && forge build
